summary: This indicator swings with the mix of exam types DCAS processes in a given year, not a change in efficiency. Fiscal 2024's low time reflected a high share of automated, single-part exams that year; Fiscal 2025 rose because that mix wasn't repeated, and the improvement in the first part of Fiscal 2026 is again attributed to a larger share of quicker, single-part exams.

sources.label: DCAS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
